prompt: Create a dreamy mythological fantasy illustration in a vertical 2:3 poster format. Use a luminous teal turquoise night-sky background with soft paper grain, tiny white stars, sparkles, and pastel celestial ornaments. In the upper center, depict an ethereal moon goddess floating in the sky beneath a large pale golden full moon; she wears flowing ancient East Asian-inspired robes made of translucent pastel ribbons in pink, lavender, mint, aqua, and pale yellow, trailing dramatically to the right like mist. Her black hair is styled in an elegant high bun with gold floral ornaments, and her face is softly obscured and painterly rather than detailed. Behind her, add a vertical aurora-like beam of watercolor light in blues, violets, greens, and pinks extending from top to bottom. Include exactly 4 large starburst shapes: one pale cyan four-point star near the upper left, one small pink star near the goddess, one large white four-point star to the right of the moon, and one yellow starburst near the middle right. Include exactly 5 round planet-like circles in warm pastel tones scattered through the scene: one peach circle on the left, one small orange circle near the goddess robe, one pale blue circle at lower right, one large translucent pale circle behind the flowering tree, and one peach circle near the lower left tree area. In the lower half, paint a delicate golden flowering tree with thin branches and many tiny yellow blossoms rising from the left side. At the bottom, create a landscape of rounded pastel cloud-hills in pink, cyan, lavender, blue, peach, and mint with watercolor texture and vertical soft streaks. Place a small white rabbit with pink eye and upright ears sitting on top of the central pink dome-shaped hill, gazing upward toward the goddess. Add fine glitter dust, shooting-star lines, and soft magical speckles throughout. Overall style: Japanese fairytale poster, watercolor gouache, pastel gradients, celestial mythology, soft edges, whimsical, serene, high detail, no text, no border, no watermark.
